# Texly — Free Online Text & AI Tools

## About
Texly (https://www.texlyonline.in/) is a free online platform offering 100+ text processing and AI tools. No signup required. All tools run instantly in your browser with complete privacy.

## What We Offer
- Text cleaning tools: remove special characters, extra spaces, duplicate lines, HTML tags
- Text case converters: uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case
- Text analysis: word count, character count, reading level
- AI-powered tools: AI text suite, image enhancer, background remover, face swap
- PDF tools: merge, split, compress PDF files
- Developer tools: JSON formatter, URL encoder/decoder, Base64 tools
- Generator tools: password generator, QR code generator

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.texlyonline.in/
- All Tools: https://www.texlyonline.in/tools
- Blog: https://www.texlyonline.in/blog
- About: https://www.texlyonline.in/about
- Contact: https://www.texlyonline.in/contact

## Technical
- Framework: React + TypeScript
- Deployment: Vercel
- Language: English (en-US)

## Contact
- Website: https://www.texlyonline.in/
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/texly_tools
- GitHub: https://github.com/chillforai/Texly
